caption: A man with a white beard and glasses, wearing a cream-colored Nehru jacket over a white shirt, stands behind a wooden podium in front of a textured, green marble wall. He is speaking, with two microphones positioned on the podium in front of him. Throughout the sequence, he uses hand gestures to emphasize his points; he begins with his hands clasped together, then opens them slightly while speaking, before momentarily returning to a still posture and finally raising his left hand in a gesturing motion. The background remains consistent, featuring a distinctive geometric pattern in the green stone and two vertical, gold-accented decorative pillars on either side of the speaker. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the frames.
